articles.description: Harry Kane is chasing Robert Lewandowski's incredible Bundesliga goal tally, while Kylian Mbappé seeks Champions League history. Here's the latest in Europe's record goal and assist tallies.

article.headline: Borussia Dortmund beaten 3-2 at home by Hoffenheim
article.description: Borussia Dortmund suffered a 3-2 defeat at home to Hoffenheim after a second-half double from Maximilian Beier on Sunday left the hosts' hold on fourth place in the Bundesliga in jeopardy.
article.linkText: Dortmund stunned 3-2 at home by Hoffenheim

article.story:
Borussia Dortmund suffered a 3-2 defeat at home to Hoffenheim after a second-half double from Maximilian Beier on Sunday left the hosts' hold on fourth place in the Bundesliga in jeopardy.

Dortmund remain on 41 points, one clear of RB Leipzig in fifth, and six adrift of third-placed VfB Stuttgart, who played out a 1-1 home draw with Cologne on Saturday.

- Stream on ESPN+: LaLiga, Bundesliga, more (U.S.)

Hoffenheim opened the scoring after two minutes when Ihlas Bebou stole the ball from the Dortmund defence to run into the box and slot home from a tight angle.

Dortmund grabbed the equaliser in the 21st through Donyell Malen's close-range volley from a corner flicked on by Marco Reus and Nico Schlotterbeck's towering header off a free kick made it 2-1 to the hosts four minutes later.

Beier equalised in the 61st minute with a deflected shot from the edge of the box and the 21-year-old scored his second three minutes later with a tap-in to restore the visitors' lead.

Dortmund captain Emre Can came close to a stoppage-time leveller but his close-range header went wide as his side fell to their first defeat in 2024.

Hoffenheim are seventh on 30 points after 23 games.

keyEvents.text: First Half begins.
Goal!  Borussia Dortmund 0, TSG Hoffenheim 1. Ihlas Bebou (TSG Hoffenheim) right footed shot from the right side of the box to the bottom left corner.

Goal!  Borussia Dortmund 1, TSG Hoffenheim 1. Donyell Malen (Borussia Dortmund) right footed shot from very close range to the high centre of the goal. Assisted by Marco Reus with a headed pass   following a corner.
Umut Tohumcu (TSG Hoffenheim) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.

Goal!  Borussia Dortmund 2, TSG Hoffenheim 1. Nico Schlotterbeck (Borussia Dortmund) header from very close range to the high centre of the goal. Assisted by Marco Reus with a cross   following a set piece situation.
Marcel Sabitzer (Borussia Dortmund) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Substitution, TSG Hoffenheim. David Jurásek replaces Robert Skov because of an injury.

Goal!  Borussia Dortmund 2, TSG Hoffenheim 2. Maximilian Beier (TSG Hoffenheim) right footed shot from outside the box to the centre of the goal. Assisted by Florian Grillitsch   following a fast break.

Goal!  Borussia Dortmund 2, TSG Hoffenheim 3. Maximilian Beier (TSG Hoffenheim) right footed shot from the centre of the box to the centre of the goal. Assisted by Anton Stach   following a fast break.
Substitution, TSG Hoffenheim. Dennis Geiger replaces Andrej Kramaric because of an injury.
Substitution, Borussia Dortmund. Jamie Bynoe-Gittens replaces Jadon Sancho.
Substitution, Borussia Dortmund. Youssoufa Moukoko replaces Niclas Füllkrug.
Substitution, Borussia Dortmund. Karim Adeyemi replaces Ian Maatsen.
Substitution, TSG Hoffenheim. Finn Becker replaces Umut Tohumcu.
Substitution, TSG Hoffenheim. Marius Bülter replaces Ihlas Bebou.
Substitution, TSG Hoffenheim. Wout Weghorst replaces Maximilian Beier.
Substitution, Borussia Dortmund. Mats Hummels replaces Julian Ryerson.
Substitution, Borussia Dortmund. Julien Duranville replaces Marco Reus.
John Anthony Brooks (TSG Hoffenheim) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Dennis Geiger (TSG Hoffenheim) is shown the yellow card.
Donyell Malen (Borussia Dortmund) is shown the yellow card.
Second Half ends, Borussia Dortmund 2, TSG Hoffenheim 3.
